creator: zdannar@gmail.com
text:
[ Second attempt at updating PR, sorry if there is duplication. ]

yongari,

Setting the kernel hint hw.pci.enable_msi="0" has made the card responsive.
I can now pull a DHCP address and everything appears to be ok.  Is this a
permanent solution for the issue?  Please let me know if there any patches
or other options that you would like to pursue.

In case you are still interested, here is the output of the pciconf command
that you requested.

Once again, thank you.

[zdannar@pcbsd-1472 ~]$ sudo pciconf -lcbv
